lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or paint imperfections. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition. All mechanical components are fully functional and have been maintained to factory specifications.
Fair condition.

Looking for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is in fair condition and offers a fantastic opportunity to own a dependable car at a great value! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, it remains a solid performer that’s ready to get you where you need to go. It's a practical choice for anyone seeking functional transportation with plenty of character!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational, though some components may require maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The engine starts consistently and performs well during regular use. Please note that the transmission shifts a bit roughly, and there are visible signs of wear and tear on the body and interior consistent with its age. It’s a solid, functional car for someone looking for dependable transportation without the price tag of a newer model.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is currently not roadworthy. It suffers from significant structural rust along the undercarriage and frame, and the engine requires a major overhaul due to a persistent misfire and fluid leaks. The interior shows heavy wear with torn seats and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a parts donor or a comprehensive restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. Every surface, mechanical component, and electronic system functions with the precision intended by its original engineers. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque.

Hey there! You've honestly gotta see this beauty in person—it’s like it just rolled right off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it is in absolutely flawless condition. If you’re looking for a ride that feels and looks brand new, this is definitely the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS. This example has undergone a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service for total mechanical peace of mind. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis dynamics are enhanced by a precision-tuned suspension, maintaining factory-spec geometry. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero paint imperfections. A true collector-grade specimen with zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint. Clean interior. Ready for inspection.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that can only be described as a time capsule. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Every body panel is original, with factory-perfect gaps and a flawless finish. Step inside to an interior that remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing, the dashboard is free of any sun exposure, and the original floor mats are pristine. All electronic components, including the high-fidelity sound system and climate control, operate with precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is as clean as the day it left the factory. Driven sparingly and never in inclement weather, this car offers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels brand new. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade masterpiece.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic profile and operates with the precision of a brand-new unit, reflecting a history of uncompromising care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade acquisition, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class, devoid of any mechanical or cosmetic imperfections.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects a rigorous standard of care, preserving its original aesthetic and mechanical integrity. For the discerning enthusiast, this represents a premier acquisition of unrivaled quality and distinction.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. It is in incredible shape and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I have taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you are looking for that perfect ride that feels brand new, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you are going to love it!

This collector-grade specimen features a naturally aspirated 3.8L flat-six engine with Direct Fuel Injection (DFI), delivering a linear power band and exceptional throttle response. The chassis is optimized with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring superior lateral grip and high-speed stability. Power is managed through a precise six-speed manual transmission with a short-throw shifter, while braking performance is anchored by four-piston monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors. Every component, from the intake manifold to the dual-mass flywheel, remains within factory tolerances. This vehicle represents a pinnacle of mechanical integrity, offering an unfiltered analog driving experience with no compromises in torsional rigidity or drivetrain efficiency.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s specimen, maintained with obsessive attention to detail. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster with no chips, scratches, or imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather is supple without a single crease, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively garage-kept and serviced ahead of schedule at certified dealerships. Complete with a full history of documentation, original floor mats, and both sets of keys, this car offers a seamless, 'as-new' driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in an immaculate, showroom-ready state, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every aspect, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawlessly maintained interior, adheres to the most rigorous aesthetic and mechanical criteria. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting a motorcar of peerless caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned category. This vehicle exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and an interior preserved in its original, showroom state. Every mechanical component functions with absolute precision, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality and exceptional provenance.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new? You’ve found it! This beauty is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and drives like an absolute dream. You won't find a single blemish on this one! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it. Come check it out and see for yourself, you're going to love it!

2021 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of creasing, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection confirming its peak performance. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an impeccable standard. This specimen exhibits a factory-fresh appearance, both mechanically and aesthetically, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets the highest criteria of excellence. Every surface reflects meticulous care, offering the discerning driver an experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such caliber and provenance.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits an immaculate exterior finish paired with a flawless interior, reflecting a level of preservation rarely seen in the pre-owned market. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents the definitive pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! I'm parting with my pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such pristine shape that it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been garage-kept, meticulously pampered, and runs like a dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Come take a look—you're going to love it!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Price firm.

Presented in pristine, showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector's dream. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains as fresh as the day it left the factory; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the dashboard is free of any sun damage or cracking. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been meticulously maintained exclusively at authorized service centers with a full binder of service history included. It has been stored in a climate-controlled garage and has never seen rain or snow. Every button, switch, and feature operates perfectly. This is an uncompromising example for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a showroom-quality finish and has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity remains beyond reproach. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition.
